session.user: Run `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py` and report the full output. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py
Check ruff linting on teleport files

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
Both files (`src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py` and `tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py`) have no linting violations or formatting issues.
